name: IRC_BULK_ACTIONS
description: Stores Bulk action data for processing.

columns.Name: BULK_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: CONTEXT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Business Object Type - It can be SUBMISSION_LIST or PROSPECT_LIST or POOL_MEMBER_LIST or CANDIDATE_SEARCH_LIST or RECOMMENDATION_LIST

columns.Name: CONTEXT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Id releated to the Context Type Ex: REQUISITION_ID , POOL_ID etc

columns.Name: ACTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores what type of action need to be performed for Bulk actions like MOVE_CANDIDATE or SEND_EMAIL or DELETE_SUBMISSION

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the Bulk Action. Lookup type - ORA_IRC_BULK_ACTION_STATUS

columns.Name: SUBMITTED_BY_USER
columns.Comments: stores the username who created the row.

columns.Name: SUBMITTED_DATE
columns.Comments: stores the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: QUERY
columns.Comments: Stores the query

columns.Name: QUERY_PARAMS
columns.Comments: Stores query params list in hash map

columns.Name: SELECTED_FILTERS
columns.Comments: Stores filtered label and values for display purpose (notification email and on action page)

columns.Name: QUERY_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Stores what type of Query it need to be like FILTER_BASED (or) MANUAL_SELECTION

columns.Name: UNSELECTED_IDS
columns.Comments: Stores Comma separated unselected Object Ids list

columns.Name: ESS_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Store ESS Job Id

columns.Name: ACTION_DATA
columns.Comments: Stores HashMap object which contains action data like new phase/state, email template etc..

columns.Name: CONSUMER_IMPL_CLASS
columns.Comments:
Stores Implementation class patch which need to be executed

Ex: "oracle.apps.hcm.recruiting.thirdParty.backgroundCheck.publicModelService.bulkActions.SubmissionBulkAction"

columns.Name: CONSUMER_AM_DEF
columns.Comments:
Stores Consumer Application Module Definition in which action need to be performed

Ex: "oracle.apps.hcm.recruiting.hiring.submissions.core.protectedModel.applicationModule.SubmissionAM"

columns.Name: CONSUMER_AM_CONFIG_DEF
columns.Comments:
Stores Consumer Application Module Configuration Definition in which action need to be performed

Ex: "SubmissionAMLocal"

columns.Name: NOTIFICATION_TOKENS
columns.Comments: Stores notification tokens for which bulk action is processed

columns.Name: TOTAL_COUNT
columns.Comments: Stores total number of rows for which bulk action is processed

columns.Name: FAILED_COUNT
columns.Comments: Stores failed rows count for which bulk action is processed

columns.Name: SKIPPED_COUNT
columns.Comments: Stores skipped rows count for which bulk action is processed

columns.Name: CANCELLED_COUNT
columns.Comments: Stores cancelled rows count for which bulk action is processed

columns.Name: FAILED_IDS
columns.Comments: Stores Comma separated failed row Ids

columns.Name: SKIPPED_IDS
columns.Comments: Stores Comma separated skipped row Ids

columns.Name: CANCELLED_IDS
columns.Comments: Comma separated cancelled row Ids

columns.Name: DEBUG_QUERY_PARAMS
columns.Comments: Stores query params in CLOB format. This is used for debugging purpose

columns.Name: DEBUG_ACTION_DATA
columns.Comments: Stores action data in CLOB format. This is used for debugging purpose

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
